Originating from the heart of Andhra Pradesh, this mango pickle is famous for its intense flavor and deep red color. The marinade is a potent blend of mustard powder (ava), red chilli powder, and oil, creating a sharp, pungent, and spicy experience that is unlike any North Indian pickle. The use of mustard powder gives it a unique "kick" that clears the sinuses and awakens the palate. Traditionally enjoyed with hot steamed rice and a dollop of ghee, Avakaya is a staple in South Indian households. FarmDidi’s version is handcrafted by rural women using authentic regional recipes, ensuring that every jar captures the true essence of Andhra cuisine. It is free from artificial preservatives and made with high-quality, natural ingredients. This pickle is perfect for those who crave high-intensity flavors and want to add a touch of South Indian tradition to their dining table.

Short Description: PatilKaki’s Puranpoli is a soulful tribute to the rich culinary heritage of Maharashtra, bringing the warmth of a traditional kitchen straight to your plate. Each Puranpoli is a masterpiece of artisanal craft, featuring a delicate, paper-thin outer layer made from high-quality wheat flour that perfectly encases a generous, flavorful filling known as 'Puran'. This filling is meticulously prepared by slow-cooking chana dal (split chickpeas) with golden jaggery, infused with the warm, aromatic notes of cardamom and a subtle hint of nutmeg. The result is a soft, melt-in-your-mouth texture that strikes a perfect balance between earthy protein and natural sweetness. These are handmade with the same love and precision as a grandmother’s recipe, ensuring an authentic taste that transports you back to festive celebrations like Holi and Gudi Padwa. Ideal for those who crave a wholesome, traditional dessert or a sweet accompaniment to their meals, these Puranpolis are best enjoyed warm with a generous dollop of pure ghee. They are completely free from artificial preservatives and synthetic colors, making them a healthier alternative to mass-produced sweets. Whether you are hosting a festive dinner, looking for a comforting evening snack, or gifting a taste of tradition, PatilKaki’s Puranpoli offers a slice of Maharashtrian culture in every bite. Store them in a cool, dry place and slightly reheat on a tawa for the most authentic experience.

This half-moon-shaped delight features a beautifully pleated, flaky crust that shatters effortlessly, revealing a delicious, aromatic dry filling. The stuffing is a traditional blend of premium desiccated coconut, powdered sugar, poppy seeds (khus khus), and a touch of cardamom, providing a nutty and sweet profile that is incredibly addictive. Often compared to the North Indian Gujiya, the Maharashtrian Karanji stands out for its specific use of dry coconut and its remarkably light, airy texture. These are deep-fried to perfection until they achieve a beautiful pale gold color and a signature crispness. Perfect for Diwali celebrations, tea-time munching, or as a thoughtful gift for friends and family, these Karanjis are made in small batches to maintain the highest quality and freshness. They are free from any artificial flavors, hydrogenated fats, or preservatives, ensuring that you get nothing but pure, home-style goodness. The combination of the crispy pastry and the aromatic coconut filling makes it a versatile snack that pairs wonderfully with a hot cup of masala chai or can be enjoyed as a standalone dessert. Store them in an airtight container to maintain their signature crunch for weeks. Experience the true taste of Maharashtra with this handmade delicacy that celebrates the spirit of Indian festivals.

The texture is uniquely delightful—slightly crunchy from the fried edible gum and chewy from the dates and coconut. These ladoos are specifically formulated to provide a sustained energy release, making them perfect for growing children, athletes, or individuals recovering from illness. They are also a traditional favorite for nursing mothers to regain strength. Free from any artificial colors or chemical additives, these handmade treats bring the authentic taste of a traditional Indian kitchen straight to your doorstep. Whether you are looking for a unique office snack, a conversation starter at a party, or a flavorful travel companion, this spicy pineapple chaat delivers. Short Description: Indulge in the sweet, therapeutic goodness of JhaJi Store's Amla Dhatrik Murabba, a traditional Indian preserve that combines health and taste in every bite.
